sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n70676" key="nhni/aton" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νηνίατον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, a Phrygian tune for the flute, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0233.tlg001:129" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hippon.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">129</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
